items.definition_en: A piece of paper money worth two dollars.
items.example_en: He found a rare two-dollar bill in his wallet.

items.definition_en: A coin with a value of fifty cents.
items.example_en: She put a fifty-cent piece into the machine.

items.definition_en: A paper note with a value of five dollars.
items.example_en: The cashier gave me a five-dollar bill as change.

items.definition_en: A coin made of metal.
items.example_en: He tossed a metal coin into the fountain.

items.definition_en: Money made from paper and used as legal tender.
items.example_en: Most countries now use paper currency.

items.definition_en: A note worth fifty dollars.
items.example_en: He paid for dinner with a fifty-dollar bill.

items.definition_en: A coin made of gold.
items.example_en: Collectors often seek out rare gold coins.

items.definition_en: A paper bill worth twenty dollars.
items.example_en: She withdrew a twenty-dollar bill from the ATM.

items.definition_en: A note with the value of ten dollars.
items.example_en: I only have a ten-dollar bill left.

items.definition_en: A coin equal to fifty cents.
items.example_en: She found a shiny fifty-cent coin.

items.definition_en: A paper note valued at one dollar.
items.example_en: He always carries a one-dollar bill for tips.

items.definition_en: A tube or wrapper filled with coins of the same value.
items.example_en: The bank gave me a coin roll for my savings jar.

items.definition_en: A special coin made to honor a person or event.
items.example_en: He collects commemorative coins from different countries.

items.definition_en: A coin produced at a mint.
items.example_en: Each minted coin has a year stamped on it.

items.definition_en: A banknote that must be accepted as payment by law.
items.example_en: This shop only accepts legal tender notes.

items.definition_en: A fake bill made to look like a real one.
items.example_en: The cashier spotted a counterfeit note in the pile.

items.definition_en: An opening in a machine where you put coins.
items.example_en: Insert a coin in the coin slot to start the dryer.

items.definition_en: A banknote made from plastic instead of paper.
items.example_en: Plastic notes last longer than paper ones.

items.definition_en: The part of a cash register where coins and notes are kept.
items.example_en: She placed the bills in the cash register drawer.

items.definition_en: A stack of paper money tied or banded together.
items.example_en: He handed the cashier a cash bundle to pay for the car.
